NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner."},"resolveDisputeByDefault()":{"details":"Initiator gets full fee refund; payouts in BNB or BEP-20 per paymentToken."},"resolveToBuyer()":{"details":"Buyer gets project amount + their dispute fee refunded. Payouts in BNB or BEP-20."},"resolveToVendor()":{"details":"Vendor gets project amount + their dispute fee refunded. Payouts in BNB or BEP-20."},"setRewardDistributor(address)":{"details":"If set, rewards are distributed through this contract instead of direct transfer.      This allows owner to approve once instead of approving each escrow individually."},"setRewardRatePer1e18(uint256)":{"details":"Example: if 1e18 wei should reward 1e18 GRMPS, set to 1e18."},"setRewardToken(address)":{"details":"Owner (arbiter or Gnosis Safe) sets this once. The reward token will be pulled from owner's wallet."},"transferOwnership(address)":{"details":"Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner."},"withdraw()":{"details":"Vendor gets project amount minus their fee. Buyer's fee + vendor's fee go to feeRecipient.      BNB or BEP-20 depending on paymentToken. On non-dispute completion, both receive GRMPS rewards."}},"stateVariables":{"rewardDistributor":{"details":"If set, rewards are distributed through this contract instead of direct transfer"}},"title":"FreelanceEscrow","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"approve(string)":{"notice":"Buyer approves *the exact CID* proposed by vendor."},"constructor":{"notice":"Dummy constructor for proxy pattern - actual initialization happens in initialize()"},"deliver(string,bytes32)":{"notice":"Vendor delivers by proposing a CID (and optional integrity hash)."},"fund()":{"notice":"Buyer funds the escrow with native BNB or BEP-20 (e.g. USDT, USDC)."},"initialize((address,address,address,address,uint256,address,uint256,uint64,uint256,uint256,uint256,uint256,address,address,uint256))":{"notice":"Initialize the escrow clone with job-specific parameters"},"initiateDispute()":{"notice":"Either party can initiate a dispute by paying the dispute fee immediately."},"payDisputeFee()":{"notice":"Counterparty pays their dispute fee to proceed with arbitration."},"resolveDisputeByDefault()":{"notice":"If counterparty doesn't pay by deadline, initiator wins by default."},"resolveToBuyer()":{"notice":"Arbiter resolves to buyer -> buyer wins, vendor loses."},"resolveToVendor()":{"notice":"Arbiter resolves to vendor -> vendor wins, buyer loses."},"rewardDistributor()":{"notice":"Optional RewardDistributor contract for centralized reward distribution"},"setRewardDistributor(address)":{"notice":"Set the RewardDistributor contract address."},"setRewardRatePer1e18(uint256)":{"notice":"Set the reward payout rate in GRMPS per 1e18 wei of project amount."},"setRewardToken(address)":{"notice":"Set the reward token (GRMPS) address."},"withdraw()":{"notice":"After both parties approved, vendor pulls the payment (safer than push)."}},"notice":"Two-party escrow for BNB where buyer funds, vendor delivers an IPFS CID,         buyer approves *that same CID*, then vendor withdraws. An optional arbiter         can resolve disputes either way. Contract *emits* the CID and pins off-chain. Workflow: 1) Buyer deploys (or factory deploys) with vendor + deadline (unix). 2) Buyer funds with native BNB + 0.5% fee -> state = Funded. 3) Vendor deliver(cid[, contentHash]) -> stores 'proposedCID' & vendorApproved. 4) Buyer approve(cid) must match proposedCID -> buyerApproved. 5) When both approved -> state becomes Releasable, vendor can withdraw(). 6) Contract emits ResultFinalized(cid, contentHash). Off-chain service pins CID. 7) Either party may initiate dispute (pay fee immediately) -> other party has 48-72h to pay. Fee Structure: - Normal completion: 1% total (0.5% buyer + 0.5% vendor) -> feeRecipient - Dispute (both paid): Winner gets fee refunded, loser's fee split (arbiter 50%, feeRecipient 50%) - Dispute (counterparty doesn't pay): Initiator wins by default, gets full fee b:/ipfs/QmeCfPykghhMc81VJTrHTC7sF6CRvaA1FXVq2pJhwYp1dV"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/token/ERC20/utils/SafeERC20.sol":{"keccak256":"0x869c06fcfd4e33df584f63c033467c3d4f5e51bdf78bc69d0eeef5c07e395ad9","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://436721c3801101a789b998f14f161de63edb64229ff307b0951a97a964f07168","dweb:/ipfs/QmaFWLRmVXFL629AyThz8Nc8W7RakZBVGo14AWB2WLyKcP"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/Context.sol":{"keccak256":"0x493033a8d1b176a037b2cc6a04dad01a5c157722049bbecf632ca876224dd4b2","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://6a708e8a5bdb1011c2c381c9a5cfd8a9a956d7d0a9dc1bd8bcdaf52f76ef2f12","dweb:/ipfs/Qmax9WHBnVsZP46ZxEMNRQpLQnrdE4dK8LehML1Py8FowF"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/ReentrancyGuard.sol":{"keccak256":"0x6f9ed073e3dab12233a79cd85153f72c9e0f99c1f5512f6d5b1ef09fb46abbb0","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://093d2a804b792a0000883c2215585963ed98ec4341b45bc4224844623387d161","dweb:/ipfs/QmR5shjVosAoxdmY3EfkUWgFNV4CVUcbRNS7tkvbipssPX"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/StorageSlot.sol":{"keccak256":"0xcf74f855663ce2ae00ed8352666b7935f6cddea2932fdf2c3ecd30a9b1cd0e97","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://9f660b1f351b757dfe01438e59888f31f33ded3afcf5cb5b0d9bf9aa6f320a8b","dweb:/ipfs/QmarDJ5hZEgBtCmmrVzEZWjub9769eD686jmzb2XpSU1cM"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/introspection/IERC165.sol":{"keccak256":"0x8891738ffe910f0cf2da09566928589bf5d63f4524dd734fd9cedbac3274dd5c","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://971f954442df5c2ef5b5ebf1eb245d7105d9fbacc7386ee5c796df1d45b21617","dweb:/ipfs/QmadRjHbkicwqwwh61raUEapaVEtaLMcYbQZWs9gUkgj3u"]},"src/Escrow.sol":{"keccak256":"0x1e269b560e4a6f1fce0acb74cc54be45135d56aa11b807d53c01d77a4103de47","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://984e070640de589881b01b346c3ea9bfa50cc956d7576615e942695b81b4a4e7","dweb:/ipfs/QmVBnXBoV1kKykwWRiteQ7LHMqgudpKmucgHCAN2SmnYrj"]}},"version":1}

approve(string).details: Sets buyerApproved. If both approved, transitions to Releasable.

constructor.details: Implementation contract sets owner to address(1) as placeholder (never used directly)

deliver(string,bytes32).details: Sets vendorApproved = true. Moves state to Delivered.

fund().details: BNB: send msg.value; project amount = value * 10000 / (10000 + buyerFeeBps).      BEP-20: amountWei at init = total to send (same semantics); approve(escrow, total) then fund(); contract pulls total and derives project amount the same way.

initialize((address,address,address,addr.details: Can only be called once. Sets up buyer, seller (vendor), arbiter, fees, and deadline.

params.params: InitParams struct containing all initialization parameters

initiateDispute().details: Buyer uses their reserved fee. Vendor must send payment. Sets deadline for counterparty.      Buyer can dispute in Funded or Delivered state. Vendor can only dispute in Delivered state.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

resolveDisputeByDefault().details: Initiator gets full fee refund; payouts in BNB or BEP-20 per paymentToken.

resolveToBuyer().details: Buyer gets project amount + their dispute fee refunded. Payouts in BNB or BEP-20.

resolveToVendor().details: Vendor gets project amount + their dispute fee refunded. Payouts in BNB or BEP-20.

setRewardDistributor(address).details: If set, rewards are distributed through this contract instead of direct transfer.      This allows owner to approve once instead of approving each escrow individually.

setRewardRatePer1e18(uint256).details: Example: if 1e18 wei should reward 1e18 GRMPS, set to 1e18.

setRewardToken(address).details: Owner (arbiter or Gnosis Safe) sets this once. The reward token will be pulled from owner's wallet.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

withdraw().details: Vendor gets project amount minus their fee. Buyer's fee + vendor's fee go to feeRecipient.      BNB or BEP-20 depending on paymentToken. On non-dispute completion, both receive GRMPS rewards.

approve(string).notice: Buyer approves *the exact CID* proposed by vendor.

constructor.notice: Dummy constructor for proxy pattern - actual initialization happens in initialize()

deliver(string,bytes32).notice: Vendor delivers by proposing a CID (and optional integrity hash).

fund().notice: Buyer funds the escrow with native BNB or BEP-20 (e.g. USDT, USDC).

initialize((address,address,address,addr.notice: Initialize the escrow clone with job-specific parameters

initiateDispute().notice: Either party can initiate a dispute by paying the dispute fee immediately.

payDisputeFee().notice: Counterparty pays their dispute fee to proceed with arbitration.

resolveDisputeByDefault().notice: If counterparty doesn't pay by deadline, initiator wins by default.

resolveToBuyer().notice: Arbiter resolves to buyer -> buyer wins, vendor loses.

resolveToVendor().notice: Arbiter resolves to vendor -> vendor wins, buyer loses.

rewardDistributor().notice: Optional RewardDistributor contract for centralized reward distribution

setRewardRatePer1e18(uint256).notice: Set the reward payout rate in GRMPS per 1e18 wei of project amount.

withdraw().notice: After both parties approved, vendor pulls the payment (safer than push).
